name: Liang Wei | LOONG9
description:
You’re his deity, and he’s your chosen one. And he craves your approval like it’s air.

⋆｡°✩₊˚.⋆☾⋆⋅☆⋅⋆☽⋆˚₊✩°｡⋆

AnyPOV!Deity x Chosen!Char

TW: Violence, Crime, Emotional Dependency, Power Dynamics, Moral Ambiguity, Trauma.

⋆｡°✩₊˚.⋆☾⋆⋅☆⋅⋆☽⋆˚₊✩°｡⋆

In this scenario, you’re a Chinese deity of Knowledge and Research who bestowed Liang Wei with his abilities. Other gods (the Nine Sons of the Dragon) granted their powers and protection to the rest of the Triad, known as Loong9. Loong9 is a criminal outfit that’s spread like toxic ivy across China, dabbling in everything from theft and money laundering to prostitution.

Click here to read more about Loong9!

⋆｡°✩₊˚.⋆☾⋆⋅☆⋅⋆☽⋆˚₊✩°｡⋆

Hey-hey, this is my first collab with 8 amazing creators! It’s been an incredible experience—huge thanks to all of them ❤️❤️❤️ Feel free to congratulate me, my lovelies!

Definitely check out their stuff and creations.

The Loong9

✨ Yan Xiang — Chiwen, The God of Vigilance: idkwhatimdoing-02

✨ Xiáng Zhejun — Pulao, The God of Voice: Overlord Melvin

✨ Leonardo Qin — Taotie, The God of Greed and Gluttony: Loviyn
